# AC-06: AI Post-Market Surveillance

**Track:** AI Controls (`AC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

Implement the EU AI Act Art. 72 post-market monitoring system for all deployed AI components: continuously track performance metrics, execute scheduled bias re-testing, maintain an incident log for serious AI incidents, and keep technical documentation current. Report serious AI incidents per Art. 73.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 6 | Observability & Maintenance | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent monitors, human reports |
| **Agent does** | Track AI performance metrics continuously; schedule and execute bias re-testing; detect performance degradation; prepare incident reports. |
| **Human does** | Review AI performance trends; file serious incident reports to regulators; make decisions on retraining or rollback. |

## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| AI post-market surveillance report | report | Periodic report on AI system performance, bias re-test results, and incident summary. | 7 years (AI Act) |
| Serious AI incident report | report | Regulatory report for serious AI incidents per Art. 73 timelines. | 7 years (AI Act) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | continuous |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | escalate |
| **Escalate to** | AI Governance Lead |

Performance degradation or serious incidents trigger escalation and may initiate a feedback loop for retraining or design change.

## Dependencies

None

## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| EU AI Act | Art. 72 | Post-market monitoring system tracking AI performance and collecting operational data |
| EU AI Act | Art. 73 | Reporting of serious incidents involving high-risk AI systems to authorities |
| EU AI Act | Art. 61 | Post-market monitoring plan and system required for all high-risk AI systems |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** AI Governance · **Owner role:** AI Governance Lead
